title: Leadership Strategy Meeting - Platform Expansion
transcript_text:
[Sarah Chen] (00:00:12): Let's talk about the platform expansion strategy. The CEO wants us to support three new integrations by Q4 - Salesforce, HubSpot, and Slack.
[Priya Sharma] (00:00:30): That's aggressive. Market research shows Salesforce integration alone could increase our enterprise deal size by 35%. But it's a 3-month build minimum.
[Sarah Chen] (00:00:50): We need to break this into phases. Phase 1: Slack integration - it's the easiest and gives us the most visibility. Phase 2: Salesforce. Phase 3: HubSpot.
[Tom Wilson] (00:01:08): From an infrastructure perspective, we need a unified integration framework first. Building each one ad-hoc will create massive tech debt.
[Sarah Chen] (00:01:25): Good point. Let's invest 4 weeks upfront in an integration SDK. Tom, can you architect that?
[Tom Wilson] (00:01:38): Yes, I'll draft the architecture doc by next Wednesday. I'll need input from John on the API design patterns.
[Priya Sharma] (00:01:55): We should also start partnership conversations. I'll reach out to Slack's developer relations team this week. We might get early API access and co-marketing.
[Sarah Chen] (00:02:15): Excellent. On the hiring front - we need at least 2 more backend engineers for this initiative. Priya, can you work with HR to open the roles by Monday?
[Priya Sharma] (00:02:32): I'll draft the JDs over the weekend. We should also consider a senior integration specialist who's worked with these platforms before.
[Sarah Chen] (00:02:50): Agreed. Budget-wise, we need to prepare a business case for the board. The integration initiative needs $500K additional budget for Q3-Q4.
[Tom Wilson] (00:03:05): That covers infrastructure scaling too? We'll need to upgrade our compute capacity for handling webhook traffic from three platforms simultaneously.
[Sarah Chen] (00:03:22): Yes, include infrastructure costs in the business case. Tom, can you estimate the cloud cost increase and add it to the budget document?
[Tom Wilson] (00:03:35): Will do. I estimate an additional $8K/month in cloud costs once all three integrations are live.
[Priya Sharma] (00:03:50): I'll compile the full business case with ROI projections. Revenue impact should be strong - each integration typically drives 20-30% increase in that segment's pipeline.
[Sarah Chen] (00:04:08): Great. Let's set a checkpoint meeting for two weeks from now. By then I want: integration SDK architecture doc, partnership outreach status, hiring pipeline started, and business case draft. Let's make this happen.
